valid: For the period 12:00 (UTC) on Thu 16 Jul 2026 to 12:00 (UTC) on Fri 17 Jul 2026
general_synopsis: High 600 miles west of northern Scotland 1030 slow-moving, intensifying 1031 by 0600 tomorrow. Low west FitzRoy 1017 losing its identity
